name: ASUS TUF GAMING B650M-E WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7600+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.2
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B650M-E WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Compact TUF GAMING Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5, dual DisplayPort, and WiFi 6.
